Support
Product support included
What's Product Support?
In the event your product doesn't work as expected or you need help using it, Amazon offers free product support options such as live phone/chat with an Amazon associate, manufacturer contact information, step-by-step troubleshooting guides, and help videos. By solving product issues, we help the planet by extending the life of products. Availability of support options differ by product and country. Learn more
Payment
Secure transaction
Your transaction is secure
We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more

Available at checkout This item is a gift. Change

      Get your estimated trade-in value
      How trade-in works
      How trade-in works
      1. Upgrade and save
      Accept your estimated trade-in value, buy your new device at the current price, and receive your delivery.
      2. Prepare device
      Sign out of all accounts linked to your old device, and factory reset it to erase your personal information.
      3. Ship within 30 days
      Print your shipping label, package your old device, and drop it off at any UPS location within 30 days of receiving your new device.
      4. Get your rebate
      After we receive your trade-in device, we'll verify it within 10 business days. Once verified, you'll receive your trade-in value as an Amazon.com Gift Card to your Amazon account for immediate use.

      Brand Samsung
      Operating System Android 16, OneUI 8
      Ram Memory Installed Size 12 GB
      CPU Model Snapdragon 8 Elite
      CPU Speed 3.5, 4.47 GHz
      Memory Storage Capacity 256 GB
      Screen Size 8 Inches
      Resolution 1968 x 2184 pixels
      Refresh Rate 120 Hz
      Model Name Galaxy Z Fold7
      See more

      About this item

      • BIGGER, YET SLIMMER THAN EVER: Who would’ve guessed that wider could also be lighter? The design of Galaxy Z Fold7 is refined to feel like a traditional smartphone with its expanded cover display.
      • BEST CAMERA ON A FOLD YET: You asked for more – now you can have the most. Galaxy Z Fold7 now boasts an ultra-premium 200MP camera with Pro-Visual Engine so you can effortlessly take incredibly detailed pics.
      • SCREENSHARE FOR STREAMLINED ASSISTANCE: Intrigued by something you see? Go Live with Google Gemini, then screenshare or point your camera at it for additional info or assistance on the fly.¹
      • DO AND VIEW MORE, ALL AT ONCE: With an 8” screen that allows you to view up to three windows at once, Galaxy Z Fold7 is the ultimate device for seeing and doing more.²
      • ALL THE POWER AND SPEED YOU NEED Smoothly run your day with the power and speed of Galaxy Z Fold7. With its customized Snapdragon 8 Elite processor for Galaxy, you can stream your favorite shows, edit photos, scroll social feeds and more with ease.³
      • TIME-TESTED TOUGHNESS: With a new, advanced Armor Aluminum frame and a Corning Gorilla Glass Ceramic 2 display, Galaxy Z Fold7 is built to handle whatever your on-the-go lifestyle throws at it.⁴
      • STAY LOCKED IN WITHOUT BEING PLUGGED IN: Create, work and game to the max – the battery life of Galaxy Z Fold7 is able to keep up with your busiest days.⁵
      • BETTER TOGETHER TO BETTER YOUR HEALTH: Conveniently track your health on the go with Galaxy Watch8 Classic, and then get deeper insights on the expansive screen of Z Fold7.⁶
      • EXPAND THE WAYS YOU STAY AHEAD: With Galaxy Z Fold7, you get to decide how to stay ahead. See your daily briefings at a glance on the cover screen, or unfold your phone for an expansive view.
      Show more
      › See more product details

        ECOLOGO certified products are made with materials that reduce environmental impact at one or more stages of their life cycle, from raw materials to end of life.       Product Description

      Expand what’s possible with Galaxy Z Fold7, the foldable that’s designed to do so much more than before.

      The expanded 6.5" cover display is made to feel like a traditional smartphone, making it more convenient to handle daily tasks— from text replies to checking the weather— without needing to unfold. For even more possibilities, open up the impressive 8" screen to create, unwind, multitask and more.

      For the first time ever for a foldable, Z Fold7 boasts a 200MP camera with ProVisual Engine so you can take stunning photos with ease. Perfecting your pics feels just as effortless. Enjoy plenty of room on the expansive inner screen to make tiny adjustments, like zooming in to delete that stranger in the background with Photo Assist or ensuring everyone’s eyes are open in the group selfie with Best Face.

      Whether you’re at home or on the go, creating on the large screen of Z Fold7 is as comfortable as it gets. View up to three windows at once and edit your content on one side while streaming videos and scrolling social feeds on the other. While you multitask, the customized Snapdragon® 8 Elite processor for Galaxy keeps your experiences smooth from start to finish.

      ¹ Results for illustrative purposes and may vary. Check responses for accuracy. Compatible with certain features and with certain accounts. Internet connection required. Available on select devices, languages, and countries. Only available to users 18 years and older. Gemini is a trademark of Google.
      ² Display measurements are diagonal, and actual viewable area is less due to rounded corners and camera hole punch.
      ³ Snapdragon is a product of Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. and/or its subsidiaries.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Customers say

      Customers find this foldable phone to be a quality device that performs flawlessly and appreciate its thin design. The screen quality receives positive feedback, with one customer noting it captures crisp and clear photos and videos, while the internal display is huge. The battery life and durability receive mixed reviews - while some find the battery life amazing, others say it's bad, and while some find it very durable, others report it breaks too easily. Customers have mixed opinions about the value for money, with some saying it's worth the price while others find it pricey.

      Amazon Customer
      5 out of 5 stars
      Swiss Army knife of phones
      My first android phone, coming from a 12 year run on iPhone I decided to go big and start with the Z fold. First thing that comes to mind is how the phone feels like a utility tool or Swiss Army knife, waiting for you to unfold and start using its blade, screwdriver, pry tool 😀 Only one drawback so far, I’ve had to start from scratch and relearn basic functions, all good tough I’ve enjoyed the ride, brings me back to how I felt first year of owning a smartphone. It’s a great phone, only thing it needs is a sturdy case, I put an OtterBox defender on mine.
      MoreHide
      Thank you for your feedback
      Sorry, there was an error
      Sorry we couldn't load the review

      Top reviews from the United States

      There was a problem filtering reviews. Please reload the page.

      • Riera Music
        5.0 out of 5 stars Excellent Phone, All the Haters Lied to Us
        Reviewed in the United States on August 26, 2025
        Color: Blue ShadowSize: 512GBStyle: Fold7Pattern Name: Phone OnlyVerified Purchase
        I’ve used Samsung’s Ultra and Note series for years, so I’m very familiar with wide, boxy phones and large displays. That’s why, when I first got the Z Fold 7, the cover screen initially felt narrow compared to what I was used to. In height it’s almost the same, but the width seemed smaller. However, this feeling only lasted a few days—once I adjusted, I realized the cover display is more than enough for everyday use. In fact, it’s very similar in size to the S25 Plus, and you can comfortably run any app on it.

        The magic happens when you unfold it. The internal display is huge, immersive, and makes you forget about missing the wider Ultra screen. You can run two apps side by side, or one above the other, almost like having two phones in one. For example, you can keep your email open on one side while chatting or receiving information on the other—copying, pasting, and multitasking without constantly switching apps. You can also watch a video on one half while replying to emails, chatting on WhatsApp, or doing other tasks on the other half. It’s an unmatched experience that no regular phone can offer.

        Multitasking and Apps
        Multitasking on the Fold is incredible. Editing photos, playing games, or browsing is simply more fun on such a large display. Most apps are optimized because Samsung’s software is excellent, and social apps like Instagram, WhatsApp, and Facebook look fantastic. If you ever prefer a narrower aspect ratio, you can quickly switch any app to “slim mode” through the multitasking options.

        Addressing the Haters’ Complaints

        Under-display camera: You can enable a black bar in apps to hide the camera area, so it never gets in the way.

        S Pen: While there’s no built-in S Pen slot, you can use a capacitive S Pen. By enabling “increased touch sensitivity” (especially if you use a tempered glass screen protector), it works very well for everyday use.

        Battery life: After weeks of use, I can confirm the battery lasts all day. With adaptive power saving and dark mode, I’ve managed up to 10 hours of screen time on the cover screen, and 7–8 hours with mixed cover and main screen use. Heavy gaming or demanding apps bring it down to 5–6 hours, which is still solid. To preserve long-term battery health, I recommend enabling battery protection (charging to 90–95%) and avoiding letting it drop below 30%.

        Cameras
        For 99% of users, the cameras are more than enough. The biggest advantage is using the high-quality rear cameras for selfies or streaming, which no standard phone—including the Ultra series—can match. Plus, when taking photos of others, they can preview themselves on the cover screen. Photos, selfies, and videos are sharp and vibrant. While professionals may prefer the S25 Ultra for advanced photography, the Fold’s versatility makes it an excellent choice for almost everyone.

        Final Thoughts
        The Z Fold 7 is an outstanding phone. Even if you’re coming from an Ultra, it only takes a few days to adjust before you realize you don’t miss the wider display. In fact, Ultras feel bulky and brick-like compared to the Fold, which is slimmer, more comfortable to hold, and far more versatile. The cover screen is fully usable for everyday apps, and when you want something larger, unfolding gives you a massive display that no traditional phone can match.

        I don’t regret switching at all—this is easily one of the best devices I’ve ever used, and I highly recommend it.
        Read more
        164 people found this helpful
        Helpful
         Report
      • D. McIntyre
        5.0 out of 5 stars A review for MOST users. ( I think)
        Reviewed in the United States on February 15, 2026
        Color: Blue ShadowSize: 256GBStyle: Fold7Pattern Name: Phone OnlyVerified Purchase
        First let me tell you how I use the z fold 7. And I will compare it to the z fold 4 for those who might want to try a z fold but don't want to spend a lot of money.
        First I use my z fold to watch videos while I am working out on the treadmill or elliptical, or if I'm waiting at a doctor's office or on in the bathroom. I respond to emails and texts but I don't use it as a work center. I play quick games or watch tik tok or other simple apps. I watch videos in bed while my wife is watching home improvement shows on tv.. If you do more or want more this review might not help you. I dont care if a certain z fold opens an app .33 seconds quicker than another. I am always by an outlet so I don't care if a certain z fold stays charged MUCH longer than another. I love the bigger screen that the fold series offer. Now. I jumped into the z fold world at z fold 4. Here are some real problems with the z fold 4 TODAY. FIRST you are going to get a used zfold. Battery life will be an issue because it's older. BUT IF all you want is what I use it for it's a great phone. Yes it's thicker than a zfold 7 yes the screen is smaller BUT it's much less expensive and will give you the same results as a z7 at a much cheaper price. SO YOURE ASKING WHY DID I BUY A Z7 THEN. GOOD QUESTION. I had 2 z4s and what really bothered me is that the hinges will at some point fail and the phone won't open all the way. A zfold should open 180 degrees a straight line. I owned 2 z4s and after a while both hinges stopped opening all the way up. More like 175+degrees. My research showed that this was a problem with the z fold 4 5 and 6. Supposedly they fixed it with the z7 but I still see on line that some ppl are having that problem. I bought this phone refurbished at a MUCH CHEAPER PRICE and so far it's great. But I have not owned it a full month. I WILL DO AN UPDATE ON MY REVIEW IF OR WHEN THE HINGE ON THIS PHONE IS A PROBLEM.
        Right now if you're new to the zfold world and you are going to use it like I DO I recommend the z4. Yes it's thicker, the battery won't last all day if you stay on YouTube or tik tok but for the price I think the z4 is great entry point. I am NEVER GOING BACK TO A NONFOLD PHONE and I'm going to wait till the trifold 3 falls in price to under 2k. So the z7 was the next best option.
        Now why I love the z7. Yes mine is used. Bigger screen, more bells and whistles, thinner and lighter and hopefully no hinge issues. After 2 z fold 4s I wasn't going to buy a 3rd. My first zfold4 the hinge was a problem but I got my second because the battery stopped working on the first one. It would only stay on if it was plugged in. No one would replace the battery for me so I bought the 2nd zfold4. My 2nd zfold had hinge issues and the apps started popping up that I couldn't get rid of and the touch screen got glitch. As far as battery life I Can't say better battery life on the z7 because it's newer. Not a fare comparison But I'm happy with it for now. If you have had a chance to handle a z series and like it and want to committed definitely the z7. If you're on the fence and don't or can't drop this kind of money the z4 is a great buy.

      • Amazon Customer
        5.0 out of 5 stars EXCELLENT PHONE, SHIPPING ISSUE WITH THIS ORDER
        Reviewed in the United States on February 10, 2026
        Color: Blue ShadowSize: 256GBStyle: Fold7Pattern Name: Phone OnlyVerified Purchase
        The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 is an awesome phone, and I have no complaints about the device itself. I ended up getting one from the AT&T store after this particular order was lost due to an accident during transport, so I can speak to the phone’s performance even though this specific unit never arrived.

        The Fold 7 performs beautifully. The screen is bright and smooth, multitasking is seamless, and the overall build quality feels solid and premium. It is powerful, responsive, and great for both productivity and everyday use. The foldable design is especially nice for reading, browsing, and using multiple apps at once.

        Unfortunately, the original shipment never arrived due to a trucking accident, so I had to purchase locally instead. That was frustrating, but it was a delivery issue, not a problem with the phone itself.

        Overall, the Galaxy Z Fold 7 is an excellent device. If you are considering a foldable phone, this one lives up to expectations.

        4.0 out of 5 stars Great phone…but $$$
        Reviewed in the United States on March 7, 2026
        Color: Blue ShadowSize: 256GBStyle: Fold7Pattern Name: Phone OnlyVerified Purchase
        I really like this foldable it’s the best of both worlds in that I can easily hold it for quick every day use but can open it up and have a large screen to watch Netflix or Hulu with ease with great clarity. It is sleek, thin, light weight and also cute. I use a smartphone for basic use in general and this one is very user friendly and I have yet to use all the “bells and whistles”. I would’ve given 5 stars but this damn phone is so pricey but I will say Amazon offered a far better deal than my actual carrier. Another issue is the screen is not always responsive but this is not a constant problem…at least so far. Overall I’m pleased 😀
